infrastructure_stack: Docker Compose (PostgreSQL+pgvector, Redis), Node.js Local Runtime, React Local Server
service_dependencies: LocalStack (S3, SQS, SES, Cognito mocks), Stripe-mock
monitoring_tools: Local Logs, NestJS Debugger, React DevTools

infrastructure_stack: GitHub Actions Runners / Jenkins Agents, Ephemeral Docker Containers
service_dependencies: LocalStack (Full AWS Mock), Stripe-mock, Nock (OpenAI API)
cost_optimization: Spot Instances for Runners, Short-lived containers

infrastructure_stack: AWS EKS (Namespace: qa), RDS (pgvector) dev instance, ElastiCache
service_dependencies: AWS Cognito (Dev User Pool), Stripe Sandbox, OpenAI Dev Key
cost_optimization: Scale down to 0 at night/weekends (Kube-downscaler), t3.medium instances

infrastructure_stack: AWS EKS (Namespace: staging), RDS Multi-AZ (Prod-spec mirror)
service_dependencies: AWS Cognito (Staging Pool), Stripe Sandbox, OpenAI Staging Key
access_control: Strict RBAC (Read-Only for most), Approvers only for deploy
cost_optimization: Spot instances for worker nodes, Reserved instances for DB

infrastructure_stack: AWS EKS (Isolated Cluster), Scaled RDS (Provisioned IOPS)
service_dependencies: Mocks for external APIs (Stripe, OpenAI) to isolate system under test latency
monitoring_tools: k6 Cloud, CloudWatch Insights, Container Insights
cost_optimization: Infrastructure provisoned only during test windows (Terraform destroy after use)

infrastructure_stack: AWS EKS (Multi-AZ), RDS Aurora PostgreSQL (Global/Multi-region), S3, CloudFront
service_dependencies: AWS Cognito (Prod), Stripe Live, OpenAI Prod
monitoring_tools: Datadog / New Relic / CloudWatch, PagerDuty, Sentry
access_control: Zero Trust, JIT Access for Admins, Break-glass protocols
backup_strategy: Continuous (PITR), Cross-Region Replication, S3 Object Lock
cost_optimization: Savings Plans, Compute Optimizer, S3 Lifecycle Policies
